reference: I had a Mirena coil fitted two weeks ago. I was hospitalized with low pelvic pain, and a scan showed that the coil was positioned low and there was free fluid in the uterus. I was on intravenous antibiotics overnight and then sent home. I have since been in pain still, but I sneezed and had a popping sensation, and the pain increases. The popping has happened twice this week. The pain is quite bad now, but I have no blood loss.
text: I had a Mirena coil put in 2 weeks ago. I was hospitalized with low pelvic pain, and a scan showed that the coil was positioned low and there was free fluid in the uterus. I was on intravenous antibiotics overnight and then slipped home. I have since been in pain still, but I sneeze and have a popping sensation, and the pain increases. The popping has happened twice this week. The pain is quite bad now, but I have no blood loss.
